Toggle navigation Pseudocercospora vitis (MYCOPS) Menu Overview → Categorization EPPO links Overview Code created in: 2007-05-12 Basic information EPPO Code: MYCOPS Preferred name: Pseudocercospora vitis Authority: (Léveillé) Spegazzini Other scientific names Name Authority Cercospora viticola (Cesati) Saccardo Cercospora vitis Saccardo Cladosporium vitis (Léveillé) Saccardo Graphium clavisporum Berkeley & M.A. Curtis Isariopsis clavispora (Berkeley & Curtis) Saccardo Isariopsis vitis Léveillé Phaeoisariopsis vitis (Léveillé) Sawada Common names Name Language leaf spot of grapevine English Propose photo Taxonomy Kingdom Fungi      (
      1FUNGK      ) Phylum Ascomycota      (
      1ASCOP      ) Subphylum Pezizomycotina      (
      1PEZIQ      ) Class Dothideomycetes      (
      1DOTHC      ) Subclass Dothideomycetidae      (
      1DTHDL      ) Order Mycosphaerellales      (
      1MYCPO      ) Family Mycosphaerellaceae      (
      1MYCOF      ) Genus Pseudocercospora      (
      1PSCSG      ) Species Pseudocercospora vitis      (
      MYCOPS      )

seed.symptoms: Irregular dark brown spots on leaves, often with lighter centers; defoliation in severe cases affecting fruit maturation.
seed.causes: Fungus Isariopsis clavispora (syn. Pseudocercospora vitis); favored by warm humid conditions.
seed.treatment: Copper-based or mancozeb fungicides; maintain spray schedule with other grape disease programs.
seed.prevention: Canopy management for airflow; remove infected debris.
